document.name: Bock Bistro
document.shortDescription: Wine-forward bistro near Deák — Bock cellar labels, seasonal Hungarian plates, and a cozy brick dining room.
document.longDescription:
Bock Bistro on Kért utca showcases the Bock family's wines alongside modern Hungarian cooking a short walk from Deák tér. The cellar list and daily menus are published on bockbistro.hu. Reservations recommended on weekends.

Sources: https://www.bockbistro.hu/
